title: astragalus squammulosus
intro: Astragalus squammulosus, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch, is a type of perennial herb belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Astragalus squammulosus include reducing fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing the body's ability to fight off infections. Astragalus squammulosus is often prepared in herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, and is commonly used as a dietary supplement to promote overall health and well-being.
